prestazioni: Engine: M30B34 (3.4L inline-6, 200hp stock) – Full forged internals with Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft by VAC Motorsports for 8,000 RPM reliability. Turbocharged with a Garrett GT3582R (0.82 A/R, 60-trim compressor) on a custom tubular manifold by Korman Autoworks, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate and 50mm external dump valve.

Fuel System: Upgraded to dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors (1,000cc/min), and a custom fuel rail by Kugelfischer. ECU: Standalone Motec M150 with custom M30B34 turbo mapping, including sequential injection and individual cylinder trimming for optimized AFR (11.5:1 under boost).

Drivetrain: Getrag 280/5 5-speed manual transmission with a 25% torsen LSD from a BMW E34 M5, reinforced with a Quaife ATB differential. Clutch: Sachs Performance twin-disc setup (240mm) with a lightweight aluminum flywheel (10.5 lbs) and uprated pressure plate for 600 lb-ft torque capacity. Driveshaft: Custom 3.5-inch aluminum unit by Driveshaft Shop with CV joints for 8,500 RPM safety.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny E28 kit (front fenders extended 2.5 inches, rear 3 inches) with integrated vented hood for turbo clearance. Paint: BMW Motorsport Nogaro Silver (274) with matte black accents and hand-painted Motorsport stripes (M-style, 5cm width) by a former BMW Classic painter.

Wheels: BBS RS-GT II (16x9 ET15 front, 16x10 ET5 rear) in gold with polished lips, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/50/16 front, 245/45/16 rear). Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (E28-specific valving) with 25mm front and 20mm rear adjustable camber plates, polyurethane bushings (80A durometer) by Vibratechnics, and custom subframe reinforcement plates by Ireland Engineering.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD Evo II seats (E28-specific mounts) in black leather with red stitching, M-Tech 2 steering wheel (380mm, suede) with a quick-release hub by Sparco. Gauges: Stack ST8000 digital dash (boost, AFR, oil pressure, fuel pressure) with a custom M30B34 sensor package by AEM. Roll cage: Custom 8-point chromoly cage by Custom Cages UK, bolt-in with rear strut tower reinforcement.
